description: The PlatformColorPalette component is a quick way of getting the colors of Resonite's Branding. This also provides you with both the color values in ColorX form and Hex form.

fields.Neutrals: A list of neutral color and hexes used for UI backgrounds in resonite.
fields.Hero: A list of color and hexes used for bright colored buttons and text like yellow for selected inspector slots or used in other cases.
fields.Sub: A darker color and hexes set used for buttons or UI that are darker due to being selected or used in other cases.
fields.Dark: A dark color and hexes set used for buttons or UI that is disabled or used in other cases.

usage: Attach to a slot and take any value as a source for a drive to drive a UI with Resonite's branding.
